allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process node -ArgumentList ''dist/server/index.js'' -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''http://localhost:3000/api/language/hsk-words?level=1'' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | Out-String -Stream | Select-Object -First 1; Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
